# AUX Cross Space

This page lives in the AUX space and is intentionally reachable from CX pages. It validates cross-space links and attachment copying from non-root spaces.

![](attachments/aux-image.png)

| Space | Target                                                    | Comment                            |
| :---- | :-------------------------------------------------------- | :--------------------------------- |
| AUX   | [CX Root](../../space__4358/page__<page-id:root_page>/page.md)         | cross-space backlink               |
| AUX   | [Shared Fixture Title](/display/AUX/Shared+Fixture+Title) | duplicate title inside AUX context |
| AUX   | \[\[Missing AUX Page]]                                    | intentionally unresolved AUX title |

Literal broken-aux-link and escaped XML \<aux attr="1"> are present for Markdown hygiene review.
